_comment: GreenGrid Single Household Simulation — ML Configuration Template

_instructions._1: This config runs a single-household simulation with ML solar generation.
_instructions._2: Set 'use_ml_solar': true to replace the synthetic math.sin() solar curve with predictions from the trained Sacramento linear regression model.
_instructions._3: When use_ml_solar is true, solar generation is driven by real Sacramento weather data (2006 NSRDB dataset) processed through the model in ML/solar_predictor.py.

simulation._duration_days_help: Simulation length in days. Use 30 for monthly, 360 for full year.
simulation._time_step_minutes_help: 60 = hourly. ML predictor uses hourly (month, hour) lookups.
simulation._start_date_help: Simulation start date. Year does not affect ML predictions since the predictor uses (month, hour) averages from the 2006 Sacramento dataset. Month does matter: it determines which Sacramento seasonal patterns are used.
simulation._season_help: Cloud coverage patterns for synthetic fallback only. Has no effect when use_ml_solar is true.
simulation._random_seed_help: Integer for reproducible results. null = different run each time.

_use_ml_solar_help: true = replace math.sin() solar generation with ML predictions from ML/solar_predictor.py. false = use standard synthetic sinusoidal model.

battery._unit_capacity_help: Capacity per battery unit in kWh (13.5 = Tesla Powerwall).
battery._count_help: Number of battery units. Total capacity = unit_capacity_kwh * count.
battery._min_soc_help: Minimum state of charge as decimal (0.05 = 5%). Protects battery health.

solar._unit_peak_help: Peak power per panel in kW. Used by ML predictor: generation_kw = capacity_factor * count * unit_peak_power_kw.

inverter._unit_max_help: Max output per inverter unit in kW. Solar generation is clipped to this limit.
inverter._count_help: Number of inverter units. Total max output = unit_max_output_kw * count.
inverter._avr_days_help: Average days between inverter failures. Uses exponential distribution.

load._base_load_help: Constant baseline consumption in kW (fridge, router, standby devices).
load._peak_hours_help: Maximum additional load during peak hours in kW (cooking, TV, etc.).
load._peak_hours_range_help: Peak demand window in 24h format. Default is 18-21h (evening).

grid._import_cost_help: Cost to import energy in $/kWh (0.0075 = 0.75 cents).
grid._export_revenue_help: Revenue from exporting energy in $/kWh (0.009 = 0.9 cents).
grid._export_limit_help: Maximum power the household can export to the grid in kW.

energy_management._strategy_help: Options: LOAD_PRIORITY (power house first), CHARGE_PRIORITY (charge battery first), PRODUCE_PRIORITY (export first).
